text: 2. coordination. If available, structural and architectural models will be provided following the kickoff meeting. If clashes cannot be resolved, or an RFI is required, the subcontractor is required to submit this to the Contractor. Note: Design models provided are to be used for reference only and shall not override the contract documents. It is the responsibility of the subcontractors to verify the design models against the contract documents and review the contract documents for coordination items not included in the provided models.
